memory:memory/2026-03-07.md:1:17.snippet: # 2026-03-07 - Continued productOS security hardening work in `repos/productOS`. - Completed and committed multiple Phase A + Phase B security changes: - Phase A: project/workflow path safety, backup restore path restrictions, skill import symlink hardening. - Phase B: secret exposure minimization, MCP trust gating (command + source), CSP hardening (`unsafe-eval` removed), Tauri capability tightening (`shell:default` removed), renderer secret-read removal with presence-only APIs. - Created branch and pushed security hardening commits to: - `security/phase-a-b-hardening` - Could not finalize PR creation from browser automation due GitHub auth screen; provided ready PR link and full PR
